reviews.review_text:
Great place to stay. Very quiet, clean, lovely host ,and it is well equipped with everything you need for a long or short stay.
We stayed here for 4nights and travelled to surrounding areas.
It's walking distance to the town centre and the wharf area.
We will be back
Nice Cabins. Easy access to town. Owner was very helpful

Great place to stay! I’ve given 5 stars to other places in the past, but now I’ve seen this one I’d say they were 4 stars because this one is superior. Julie is a very friendly host and it’s such a great space for kids to play, the cabins are so well maintained and well stocked. I had the best sleep I’d had in ages. It’s a short walk to town, the market and the rail trail with a nice outlook over the water. Highly recommend! Also, I think picking up the phone and booking directly through them is better

Such an amazing place for a holiday. Julie was lovely and went out of her way to be helpful, and the alpacas on site were a fantastic bonus! The rooms were clean, comfortable, and everything was well looked after. We had a great stay and would definitely recommend it.”

Stayed here last night with my daughter and two granddaughters…We had the best time we stayed in the train carriage very unique and well set out beds were comfy, lovely setting we fed the alpacas some apples which they enjoyed, even though one of my granddaughters did cop a little bit of a spit by one lol…highly recommend visiting this beautiful spot
Loved our unit on the river....very clean had everything we needed...alpacas to behold and loved the check in phonebox ...would definitely go back

We are boomerang guests.  Love the ease and tranquillity not to mention the birds chooks and alpacas.  Julie is fantastic.
We stay either in the apartment or a cabin.
Exceptional place where everything is great

A peaceful holiday park with plenty of space for kids to play or for you to sit back and enjoy the views of the Moyne River. The cabins are well equipped with stove top and fridge. Whilst there is not an oven in the cabin there is a communal oven in a shack. In the shack there are also 2 Weber barbecues, a fire place and plenty of sporting equipment free to use. Kids will also be happy here with a playground and giant trampoline. I have been coming to this place almost every year with my family since I was young and used to spend hours playing outside or chasing the Alpakas and chickens on the grounds.

The park is a 5min walk to the beach and town centre and is literally next to the bike path. The owners are incredibly friendly too.
Stayed in one of the train rooms last night, so good, kids would love it as well. Julie the host was so friendly and welcoming, will definately stay again whenever we come back to Port Fairy.
Accomdation good practical good amount of room in cabin ,train accomdation onsite nice quiet area near the moine river nice walking trail runs past park👍

Cannot fault this place. Warm welcome from Julie, and the unit was spotless. Definitely will come back when summer hits.  Even got a spit in the face from our little farm friends (llamas) which caused a great deal of laughter and fun. Port Fairy is such a beautiful town. Get there!
Great spot, accommodation was terrific and can't wait to return
What a magical place to stay.  Our villa looks like a palace and Julie is such a lovely lady.  Can't wait to come back in September.  Thanks for having us pelican waters !!!
Beautiful and peaceful spot for your vacation.
This cabin was stunning and super chill. Our family of four had an amazing time here, and we definitely recommend it. We’ll be back for sure!
Great place, excellent location, good facilities, friendly management
Extremely comfortable cabin with all facilities required. Julie was friendly and welcoming and helpful in providng information about Port Fairy. Walking distance to shops and beach.
Very interesting and children's heaven.  Alpacas are happy at farm as well

Such a gem of a place! Julie made us SO welcome - the epitome of country hospitality. The unit was brilliant - huge bathroom with fabulous shower, really comfortable bed, well-equipped kitchen, sunny deck, super quiet, easy stroll to town and the beach. And alpacas and chooks! Loved it
Well equipped, clean cabin. Amazing location, quiet, except for the birds. Short walk down the rail trail to town. Hopefully I will be back soon.

We stayed in a modern, two bedroom cabin and were really impressed from the minute we opened the door; this was a great feeling after being on the road all day.
Really clean and quiet and my bed was the best ever. The unit is a short walk to the shops and cafes, and the water.
Amazing, we stayed in the train car and it was a dream come true, friendly staff. Great rooms, definitely recommend
